reasoning: The Lean formalization matches the informal Putnam 1987 B6 statement exactly. `hp : Odd p ∧ Nat.Prime p` captures "odd prime". `Fcard : Fintype.card F = p ^ 2` captures "field of p² elements". `Snz` and `Scard` capture "set of (p²-1)/2 nonzero elements" (the ℕ-to-ℤ coercion on the cardinality equation resolves correctly since (p²-1)/2 is a positive integer for odd primes). `hS` uses Mathlib's `Xor'` (defined as `(a ∧ ¬b) ∨ (b ∧ ¬a)` in `Mathlib/Logic/Basic.lean`), which is exactly "exactly one of a and -a is in S". The conclusion `Even ((S ∩ {x | ∃ a ∈ S, x = 2 * a}).ncard)` is precisely "N = |S ∩ {2a : a ∈ S}| is even". All quantifiers, types, and conditions are faithful.
